## Checklist

- [ ] CI is green: `codegen:check`, `typecheck`, `build`, `test`, `lint`
- [ ] If I changed the schema, I ran `pnpm codegen` and committed the regenerated types
- [ ] If I changed the schema, I validated against the real examples (`rfphub-validate`)
- [ ] Docs updated (README / FIELDS / CROSSWALK) where relevant
- [ ] Added a changeset for user-facing changes (`pnpm changeset`)
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits
